/bin/zsh -lc "sed -n '1,110p' sympy/physics/units/systems/si.py; sed -n '1,140p' sympy/physics/units/definitions/dimension_definitions.py; rg -n \"dimsys_SI\" sympy/physics/units/systems/si.py | head -20; git status --short"

/bin/zsh -lc "./.venv/bin/python - <<'PY'
from sympy.physics import units
from sympy.physics.units.systems.si import SI
v1 = units.Quantity('v1_report')
SI.set_quantity_dimension(v1, units.velocity)
SI.set_quantity_scale_factor(v1, 2 * units.meter / units.second)
a1 = units.Quantity('a1_report')
SI.set_quantity_dimension(a1, units.acceleration)
SI.set_quantity_scale_factor(a1, -9.8 * units.meter / units.second**2)
t1 = units.Quantity('t1_report')
SI.set_quantity_dimension(t1, units.time)
SI.set_quantity_scale_factor(t1, 5 * units.second)
expr = a1*t1 + v1
print('expr:', expr)
print('args:', expr.args)
for arg in expr.args:
    print(arg, '=>', SI._collect_factor_and_dimension(arg))
dims = [SI._collect_factor_and_dimension(arg)[1] for arg in expr.args]
ds = SI.get_dimension_system()
print('dims equal:', dims[0] == dims[1])
print('deps:', *(ds.get_dimensional_dependencies(dim) for dim in dims))
print('equivalent:', ds.equivalent_dims(*dims))
print('sum factor:', sum(SI._collect_factor_and_dimension(arg)[0] for arg in expr.args))
PY"

/bin/zsh -lc "./.venv/bin/python - <<'PY'
from sympy.physics import units
from sympy.physics.units.systems.si import SI
v1 = units.Quantity('v1')
SI.set_quantity_dimension(v1, units.velocity)
SI.set_quantity_scale_factor(v1, 2 * units.meter / units.second)
a1 = units.Quantity('a1')
SI.set_quantity_dimension(a1, units.acceleration)
SI.set_quantity_scale_factor(a1, -9.8 * units.meter / units.second**2)
t1 = units.Quantity('t1')
SI.set_quantity_dimension(t1, units.time)
SI.set_quantity_scale_factor(t1, 5 * units.second)
expr1 = a1*t1 + v1
print(expr1, expr1.args)
for arg in expr1.args:
    print(arg, SI._collect_factor_and_dimension(arg))
ds = SI.get_dimension_system()
print(ds.equivalent_dims(units.velocity, units.acceleration*units.time))
print(ds.get_dimensional_dependencies(units.velocity))
print(ds.get_dimensional_dependencies(units.acceleration*units.time))
PY"
